stt_test_data.text: Hello, my name is Al Amin. Today I am testing a speech to text API. I want to see how accurately it converts my voice into text. The weather is nice today and I am working from my laptop.
Today is March 6, 2026. My meeting starts at 3:45 PM. The project budget is 12,750 dollars. My phone number is 01712-345-678.

I am building a Python application using FastAPI and PostgreSQL. The system uses SQLAlchemy as the ORM layer. We also integrate a retrieval augmented generation pipeline with LangGraph and vector embeddings.

When building scalable systems engineers must consider latency fault tolerance horizontal scaling and monitoring because a system that works for one hundred users may completely fail when it suddenly needs to support one hundred thousand users.
Hello this is Amin speaking. Ami ekta speech to text API test kortesi. I want to see if the system correctly understands my Bangladeshi accent when I speak English.
Artificial intelligence is rapidly transforming software development enabling developers to automate repetitive tasks generate code and build more intelligent applications faster than ever before.
